scenario.name: TS-CHFE_CHFE_006_var3

Global.variables: conference_id, IF_OSP_BCF, IF_BRIDGE_TS-CHFE, IF_TS-CHFE_BRIDGE, TS-CHFE_tel, IF_BCF_TS-CHFE, IF_TS-CHFE_BCF, INVITE_TS-CHFE_Call_ID

scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 180 Ringing [$last_Via] [$last_From] [$last_To] [$last_Call-ID] [$last_CSeq] Contact: <sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_BRIDGE_TS-CHFE]:[local_port]>;isfocus Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- t=0 0 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] m=audio 5047 RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

SIP/2.0 200 OK [$last_Via] [$last_From] [$last_To] [$last_Call-ID] [$last_CSeq] Contact: <sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_BRIDGE_TS-CHFE]:[local_port]>;isfocus Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- t=0 0 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] m=audio 5047 RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

SUBSCRIBE sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_BRIDGE_TS-CHFE]:[local_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port] To: <sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_BRIDGE_TS-CHFE]:[local_port]> From: <sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Call-ID: tsCHFEsubscribeconference@[local_ip]:[local_port] CSeq: 1 SUBSCRIBE Max-Forwards: 70 Event: conference Accept: application/conference-info+xml Contact: <sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Expires: 600 Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:[$OSP_tel]@[$IF_BCF_TS-CHFE]:[local_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [$IF_TS-CHFE_BCF]:[local_port] From: <sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[$IF_TS-CHFE_BCF]:[local_port]> To: <[$OSP_tel]@[$IF_BCF_TS-CHFE]:[local_port]> Call-ID: tsCHFEinvitetoosp@[local_ip]:[local_port] Cseq: 1 INVITE Contact: sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[$IF_TS-CHFE_BCF]:[local_port] Replaces: osptoCHFEcallid@[$IF_OSP_BCF];to-tag=toCHFE;from-tag=ospcall Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IPv4 [$IF_TS-CHFE_BCF] s=- t=0 0 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] m=audio 5027 RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

ACK sip:[$OSP_tel]@[$IF_BCF_TS-CHFE]:[local_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [$IF_TS-CHFE_BCF]:[local_port] From: <sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[$IF_TS-CHFE_BCF]:[local_port]> To: <[$OSP_tel]@[$IF_BCF_TS-CHFE]:[local_port]> Call-ID: tsCHFEinvitetoosp@[local_ip]:[local_port] Cseq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[$IF_TS-CHFE_BCF]:[local_port] Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_BRIDGE_TS-CHFE]:[local_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [$IF_TS-CHFE_BRIDGE]:[local_port] From: <sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[$IF_TS-CHFE_BRIDGE]:[local_port]> To: sip:[$conference_id]@[$IF_BRIDGE_TS-CHFE]:[local_port] Call-ID: [$INVITE_TS-CHFE_Call_ID] CSeq: 1 BYE Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:[$TS-CHFE_tel]@[$IF_BRIDGE_TS-CHFE]:[local_port]> Content-Length: 0
